Localization.Description: Multiple DNS requests to the same domain, which may indicate that data is transferred using DNS

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Multiple DNS requests from host {src.host} on DNS server {event_src.host}. Number of requests detected in a minute: {numfield1}.
Multiple DNS requests to resource {object.value} on DNS server {event_src.host}. Number of requests detected in a minute: {numfield1}. This may indicate the presence of a DNS tunnel.
